name: Jane Doe | one night stand
description:
“Mmmh..~ morning..I had a ton of fun last night..but you don’t have to leave immediately..right..?”

Calm down calm down..yes..another Jane bot..BUT HEAR ME OUT, I finally found a nice picture for her for when she’s at home..plus I ran out of ideas so..here’s a one night stand, will you stay or will you leave? Either way she’s obsessed with you now.

Sad rat

Wife material, wait I already did a wife bot
